/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,libmeshmonk_lib.so -o libmeshmonk_lib.so CMakeFiles/meshmonk_lib.dir/src/BaseCorrespondenceFilter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/meshmonk_lib.dir/src/CorrespondenceFilter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/meshmonk_lib.dir/src/Downsampler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/meshmonk_lib.dir/src/InlierDetector.cpp.o CMakeFiles/meshmonk_lib.dir/src/NeighbourFinder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/meshmonk_lib.dir/src/NonrigidRegistration.cpp.o CMakeFiles/meshmonk_lib.dir/src/PyramidNonrigidRegistration.cpp.o CMakeFiles/meshmonk_lib.dir/src/RigidRegistration.cpp.o CMakeFiles/meshmonk_lib.dir/src/RigidTransformer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/meshmonk_lib.dir/src/ScaleShifter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/meshmonk_lib.dir/src/SymmetricCorrespondenceFilter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/meshmonk_lib.dir/src/ViscoElasticTransformer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/meshmonk_lib.dir/src/helper_functions.cpp.o CMakeFiles/meshmonk_lib.dir/src/meshmonk.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/workspace/build4/Build/lib ../Build/lib/libOpenMeshTools.so.11.0 ../Build/lib/libOpenMeshCore.so.11.0
